basics.name: Julio César Díaz
basics.label: Front-End Developer
basics.summary: Front-End Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, Next.js, and modern JavaScript technologies. Specialized in responsive design, performance optimization, and cloud-based solutions.
